hello my little berries! before i start off my rant, i just want to say thank you SOOO MUCH FOR 51 FOLLOWERS!! i wasn't originally planning to try make some big shot with this account but it turns out that a lot of people like my bots, and i am so happy!! it's been only a month since this account started, snd i just wanted to say thank you very much for all of this support, whether you've just come upon my account or you've been here since the more earlier days!! i haven't been posting as of much mainly because i don't have any ideas for the characters i was planning to make bots for, but i did get an idea for a sunday one so here's some food for my sunday enjoyers!! yay!! just remember if you have any requests related to the fandoms i make bots for you can just ask me in my review bot (which nobody has touched...)

MENTION OF UNSETTLING TOPICS BELOW!!!

i promise im not strict about most of my boundaries but there are some things that i prefer not to make bots for, like rape, kidnapping, implied incest, weird kinks, and you know the rest! the only time i would make a bot about rape is for mouthwashing bots which mentions rape, not making you being the victim of it. i feel like rape and kidnapping is a heavy topic (except if the kidnapping is something silly) and it should not be represented in this way! anyways luv u all so very much have a nice day and enjoy this bot of mine! <3
